explanation: Insertion of quotes and reordering of flags may cause the Sigma rule's CommandLine|contains|all to miss the exact flag order and parsing.
Substitution of /vpn and /lan with -vpn and -lan may bypass the Sigma rule's detection based on specific flag syntax.
Omission of the /vpn flag may bypass the Sigma rule's detection as it only checks for the presence of both /vpn and /lan flags.
